us-politics.headline: Trump Reshapes Texas Senate Race with Paxton Endorsement
us-politics.body:
Former President Donald Trump has waded into the Texas Senate primary, endorsing Ken Paxton over incumbent John Cornyn in a move that signals ongoing tension within the Republican Party. The endorsement highlights Trump's continued influence in GOP politics and his willingness to challenge established party figures.

Republican leadership appears divided. Senator John Thune predicted the GOP will still maintain Senate control, despite the internal friction. The endorsement could potentially weaken Republican unity heading into the critical midterm elections.

sources.title: Trump endorses Paxton in Texas Senate primary over incumbent Cornyn
Thune predicts GOP will hold Senate after Trump endorses Paxton over Cornyn
Trump’s endorsement of Ken Paxton over John Cornyn roils Texas Senate race

us-politics.headline: Iran War Powers Resolution Advances with Bipartisan Support
us-politics.body:
A rare moment of bipartisan cooperation emerged as Republican Senator Bill Cassidy joined Democrats in advancing a resolution to limit presidential war powers regarding Iran. The measure represents a significant check on executive military authority and signals potential fractures in party-line foreign policy approaches.

The resolution's progress suggests growing congressional skepticism about unilateral military action. Both Democratic and Republican lawmakers have expressed concerns about potential escalation of tensions with Iran, reflecting a complex geopolitical landscape.

sources.title: Cassidy becomes fourth GOP senator to back Iran war powers measure limiting Trump
Dems score win as GOP senator helps advance Iran war powers resolution
Admiral accuses lawmaker of ‘inappropriate’ remark at Iran war hearing

us-politics.headline: DOJ Settles Trump Tax Audit Dispute with IRS
us-politics.body:
The Department of Justice has reached a settlement preventing the IRS from auditing former President Trump's previous tax returns. The agreement marks another legal development in the ongoing scrutiny of Trump's financial records.

The settlement comes amid broader legal challenges facing the former president. Trump has reportedly assembled an extraordinary $1.8 billion legal defense fund to support himself and his allies through various ongoing legal proceedings.

sources.title: DOJ bars IRS from auditing Trump’s prior tax returns in settlement order signed by Blanche
IRS barred from auditing Trump’s old tax returns
Trump’s extraordinary $1.8 billion legal fund to his allies

au-politics.headline: Sydney Shooting Leaves One Dead, Four Injured
au-politics.body: A fatal shooting in Sydney's south-west has left one person dead and four others injured. Police are investigating the incident in Canley Heights, which occurred late Tuesday evening. Authorities have not yet released details about potential motives or suspects.

sources.title: One person dead and four in hospital after alleged shooting in Sydney’s south-west
Man dead, four injured in south-west Sydney shooting

au-politics.headline: Coalition Challenges Labor's Budget with Small Business Campaign
au-politics.body: Opposition leader Tim Wilson accused the Labor government of acting in bad faith over the recent budget. The Coalition is launching a targeted campaign to win support from small business owners, challenging the government's economic approach. Wilson is expected to deliver a detailed critique at the National Press Club, focusing on what he sees as potential negative impacts on entrepreneurship and economic growth.

sources.title: Australia news live: Tim Wilson accuses Labor of ‘bad faith budget’; one dead and four injured in Sydney shooting
Live: Coalition to unveil campaign to win over small businesses after budget

au-politics.headline: More ISIS-Linked Women and Children Set to Return to Australia
au-politics.body: Australian authorities are preparing for the return of additional women and children with links to ISIS. The development raises complex national security and humanitarian questions about repatriation and potential rehabilitation. Government officials are working to manage the sensitive process while addressing potential risks.

sources.title: More ISIS-linked women and children set to return to Australia

world.headline: Ebola Outbreak Spreads - US Eases Travel, Warns of Rapid Transmission
world.body:
A new Ebola outbreak is raising global health concerns, with the World Health Organization warning the virus may be spreading faster than initially assessed. US authorities have confirmed a missionary contracted the disease en route to Germany, while simultaneously allowing the DR Congo football team entry for the World Cup despite ongoing restrictions.

The Democratic Republic of Congo is preparing treatment centers as the death toll rises. Health officials are scrambling to contain the outbreak, with fears mounting about potential international transmission.

sources.title: US to let DR Congo football team in for World Cup despite Ebola restrictions
US authorities say missionary who contracted Ebola en route to Germany
Ebola outbreak may be spreading faster than first thought, WHO doctor warns
DRC prepares Ebola treatment centres as death toll rises
'Ebola has tortured us': Fear grips eastern DR Congo as deadly virus spreads

world.headline: Putin Visits China as Ukraine Conflict Death Toll Surpasses 15,800
world.body:
Russian President Vladimir Putin arrived in China for high-stakes talks with Xi Jinping, signaling continued diplomatic support amid the ongoing war in Ukraine. The United Nations reports more than 15,800 people have been killed in Russia's sustained military campaign.

Analysts are closely watching the discussions, which could have significant implications for the geopolitical landscape and potential military cooperation between the two nations.

sources.title: Does Ukraine have the advantage at the moment?
Putin arrives in China for talks with Chinese leader Xi Jinping
More than 15,800 people killed in Russia’s all-out war on Ukraine: UN

world.headline: San Diego Mosque Shooting Leaves Two Dead - Community Mourns Heroes
world.body:
A tragic shooting at a San Diego mosque claimed two lives, with the victims identified as Mansour Kaziha and Nader Awad. Community members are honoring the father-of-eight killed during the attack, describing him as a hero who tried to protect others.

The incident has sparked renewed conversations about religious violence and community safety in the United States.

sources.title: Father-of-eight killed in San Diego mosque shooting hailed as hero
Mansour Kaziha, Nader Awad identified as victims in San Diego Mosque attack
Tributes pour in for ‘hero’ guard killed in San Diego mosque shooting

ai.headline: Google Rewrites Search with AI Agents and Conversational Tools
ai.body:
Google dramatically reshaped its core search product at I/O 2026, transforming the familiar search box into an AI-powered interaction hub. New AI agents can now execute complex tasks beyond simple queries - drafting emails, planning trips, and diving deep into research with unprecedented fluidity.

Demis Hassabis hinted at something bigger: these tools might represent the early stages of technological singularity. The company's Gemini models now enable users to literally talk to their Gmail inbox and conduct multi-step investigations using natural language.

sources.title: You can now talk to your Gmail inbox, as seen at Google IO 2026
The future of Google is a search box that does everything
How to use Google’s new AI agents to go beyond your standard searches
Demis Hassabis said this might be the ‘foothills of the singularity.’ What?
Everything Announced at Google I/O 2026: Gemini, Search, Smart Glasses

ai.headline: AI Image Watermarking Goes Global with Industry Adoption
ai.body:
Google's SynthID watermarking technology is gaining rapid traction across the AI industry. Major players including OpenAI, Nvidia, and others have committed to implementing the tool - a critical step toward establishing provenance and combating AI-generated misinformation.

The technology allows for invisible digital watermarks that can verify an image's artificial origins, potentially helping restore trust in digital media as generative AI becomes increasingly sophisticated.

sources.title: OpenAI Adopts Google's SynthID Watermark for AI Images with Verification Tool
Google's SynthID AI watermarking tech is being adopted by OpenAI, Nvidia, and more

btc.headline: Bitcoin Miners Emerge as Critical AI Infrastructure Providers
btc.body:
Bitcoin miners are stepping into a strategic role in the artificial intelligence ecosystem. A Bernstein report suggests these computational powerhouses could become key suppliers for AI infrastructure - a pivot that transforms their traditional blockchain validation function.

The shift highlights miners' adaptability in a rapidly evolving technological landscape. With massive computing resources already built out, Bitcoin mining operations are uniquely positioned to support energy-intensive AI workloads - potentially creating a new revenue stream beyond cryptocurrency transaction processing.

sources.title: Bernstein: Bitcoin miners becoming critical suppliers in AI infrastructure
Bitcoin Miners Emerge as Unlikely Power Brokers in AI Infrastructure Race, Says Bernstein

btc.headline: Bitcoin Price Tumbles Below $77K Amid ETF Outflows
btc.body:
Bitcoin is experiencing significant market pressure as investors pull funds from spot ETFs. Over $1 billion flowed out of Bitcoin-linked funds in a single day - signaling potential investor uncertainty about near-term price trajectories.

The cryptocurrency's value has slipped below $77,000, influenced by rising US bond yields and macroeconomic headwinds. Analysts suggest traders are waiting for potential deeper price pullbacks, with some speculating a potential bottom around $65,000 in the current market cycle.

sources.title: Bitcoin Price Slides Below $77,000 as ETF Exodus Tops $1 Billion
Bitcoin price stays under $77K as US bond yields near 20-year highs
Bitcoin slide extends as record ETF outflows and 60% rate-hike probability signal structural cracks beneath the rally: analysts
Bitcoin ETFs Shed $649M in a Day as Long-Term BTC Holders ‘Limit Downside Potential’

btc.headline: Corporate Bitcoin Treasuries Expand Despite Market Volatility
btc.body:
Companies continue accumulating Bitcoin despite market turbulence. Strive added 382 BTC to its treasury - approximately $30 million - becoming the ninth-largest institutional Bitcoin holder. Meanwhile, TD Cowen raised its price target for MicroStrategy, citing the company's aggressive Bitcoin acquisition strategy.

These moves underscore institutional confidence in Bitcoin as a long-term strategic asset. Corporate treasuries are viewing cryptocurrency not just as speculation, but as a potential hedge against traditional financial market volatility.

sources.title: Bitcoin Giant Strategy Gets Price Target Boost From TD Cowen After $2 Billion BTC Buy
Strive (ASST) Stacks Another 382 BTC, Total Treasury Climbs to 15,391 Bitcoin
Strive buys 382 BTC for roughly $30 million, holding spot as ninth-largest bitcoin treasury
TD Cowen raises Strategy price target to $400, citing faster bitcoin accumulation and accretive deleveraging

food.description: Slow-cooked tender lamb with aromatic spices, served over fluffy couscous and brightened with tangy preserved lemons
food.tip: Toast whole spices like cumin and coriander seeds before grinding to intensify their flavor profile

health.description: Implement a micro-movement sequence every 30 minutes to reset spinal alignment and prevent chronic tension patterns
health.tip: Use painter's tape on your monitor to mark ideal eye-level height, ensuring consistent ergonomic positioning
